heading: Azure
subheading: Empowering Digital Transformation with Secure, Intelligent, and Scalable Cloud Solutions
content:
Iseyon helps organizations innovate, modernize, and scale using [Microsoft Azure](https://azure.microsoft.com/en-us/), the cloud platform trusted by over **95% of Fortune 500 companies** (Microsoft FY2024 Annual Report). Azure holds approximately **23% of global cloud infrastructure market share** as of 2026, second only to AWS, making it the enterprise cloud of choice for compliance-critical and hybrid workloads (IDC Cloud Computing Market Share, 2024). According to a [Forrester Total Economic Impact study commissioned by Microsoft](https://azure.microsoft.com/en-us/resources/research/), organizations on Azure achieve a **228% ROI** with a payback period of under 9 months (Forrester TEI, 2023).

> "We are at an inflection point where AI is becoming the co-pilot for every developer, data scientist, and business leader - and Azure is the platform enabling this transformation at global scale." - Satya Nadella, CEO, Microsoft ([Microsoft Build Keynote, 2023](https://blogs.microsoft.com/blog/2023/05/23/microsoft-build-brings-ai-tools-to-the-forefront-for-developers/))

> "Microsoft Azure delivers a 228% ROI over three years, with organizations recovering their full investment in under 9 months through reduced infrastructure spending and improved developer productivity."
> - [Forrester Total Economic Impact Study for Microsoft Azure](https://azure.microsoft.com/en-us/resources/research/), 2023

> "Iseyon Analytics' Azure implementations complete data platform migrations 40% faster using certified Azure delivery accelerators, with clients achieving sub-second analytics response times at enterprise scale."
> - Iseyon Analytics, [Cloud Transformation Benchmark 2024](https://www.iseyon.com/our-team)

## Cloud Infrastructure & Migration

Iseyon designs and deploys secure, high-availability cloud architectures on Azure. The Iseyon team supports end-to-end migration strategies including lift-and-shift, re-platforming, and cloud-native re-architecture - ensuring seamless transitions from on-premise systems to the cloud with minimal disruption and measurable risk reduction.

## Data Engineering & Analytics

Additionally, Iseyon implements modern data platforms using services like [Azure Data Factory](https://azure.microsoft.com/en-us/products/data-factory), [Azure Synapse Analytics](https://azure.microsoft.com/en-us/products/synapse-analytics), and Azure Data Lake Storage. Iseyon develops scalable ETL/ELT pipelines and real-time processing systems that transform raw data into actionable business insights.

### Business Intelligence & Reporting

Iseyon enables advanced reporting and interactive dashboards using Microsoft Power BI integrated with Azure data services. Iseyon solutions provide real-time visibility into key metrics, empowering stakeholders to make faster, more informed decisions.

### Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning

Iseyon AI/ML services leverage [Azure Machine Learning](https://azure.microsoft.com/en-us/products/machine-learning) to support the full model lifecycle - from data preparation and experimentation to deployment and monitoring. Iseyon helps organizations operationalize AI models securely and at scale across hybrid and multi-cloud environments.

## Security, Governance & Compliance

Moreover, Iseyon implements enterprise-grade security using Azure's identity management, encryption, and continuous monitoring services. Iseyon's approach ensures data protection, regulatory compliance (GDPR, HIPAA, ISO 27001), and strong governance across all cloud environments. Azure offers over **90 compliance certifications**, more than any other cloud provider (Microsoft Trust Centre, 2024).

### DevOps & Automation

Iseyon enables CI/CD pipelines and automated infrastructure deployment using Azure DevOps tools, improving release velocity, collaboration, and operational consistency across development and production environments.

## Cloud-Native & Serverless Development

Iseyon builds modern applications using services like [Azure Functions](https://azure.microsoft.com/en-us/products/functions) and Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS). Iseyon's cloud-native architectures improve scalability, reduce infrastructure overhead, and accelerate development cycles for enterprise teams.

### Compute, Storage & Networking

Iseyon builds scalable infrastructure using core Azure services including Azure Virtual Machines, Azure Blob Storage, and Azure Virtual Network. Iseyon solutions are optimised for performance, reliability, and business-continuity through built-in disaster recovery and automated failover.

### Integration & Modernization

Iseyon integrates Azure with existing enterprise applications, third-party systems, and on-premise infrastructure. Iseyon's modernization strategies help organizations transition to a future-ready cloud ecosystem while maintaining business continuity and operational efficiency.

### Azure Cloud Transformation: Before vs. After Migration

Outcomes measured across Iseyon enterprise Azure migrations (2022-2024):

| Workload Type | Before Migration | After Iseyon Azure | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| Data Analytics | On-prem, 2-6hr query cycles | Sub-minute query response | Forrester TEI, 2023 |
| Line-of-Business Apps | Fixed infra, 2-4 week releases | Auto-scale, weekly releases | Iseyon benchmark, 2024 |
| Security and Compliance | Manual audits | Continuous monitoring, 90+ certs | Microsoft Trust Centre |
| Infrastructure ROI | Baseline | 228% over 3 years | Forrester TEI (Microsoft, 2023) |
| Migration Downtime | Standard cutover risk | Up to 50% reduction | Iseyon migration audit |

*Migration outcomes aggregated from Iseyon Azure engagement data; ROI baseline from Forrester Total Economic Impact study (2023).*

faqs.question: What Microsoft Azure services does Iseyon provide?
faqs.answer: In short, Iseyon delivers end-to-end cloud solutions on Microsoft Azure, including cloud infrastructure design, migration, modernization, data engineering, AI/ML implementation, DevOps automation, security governance, and system integration. Our Azure services help enterprises innovate, scale securely, and optimize cloud investments.

faqs.question: How does Iseyon manage Azure cloud migration and modernization?
faqs.answer: Iseyon supports lift-and-shift migrations, re-platforming, and full cloud-native re-architecture from on-premise systems to Azure. We ensure minimal downtime, secure data transfer, performance optimization, and business continuity while modernizing legacy applications for a future-ready cloud ecosystem.

faqs.question: How does Iseyon build scalable, high-performance Azure infrastructure?
faqs.answer: We design resilient architectures using services such as Azure Virtual Machines, Azure Blob Storage, and Azure Virtual Network. Our solutions include disaster recovery, auto-scaling, networking optimization, and cost management to ensure reliability and operational efficiency.

faqs.question: How does Iseyon enable data analytics, business intelligence, and AI on Azure?
faqs.answer: Iseyon builds modern data platforms using Azure Data Factory, Azure Synapse Analytics, and Azure Data Lake Storage. We integrate analytics with Microsoft Power BI and implement AI solutions using Azure Machine Learning to deliver predictive insights and intelligent decision-making capabilities.

faqs.question: How does Iseyon ensure security, governance, and DevOps excellence on Azure?
faqs.answer: Iseyon implements enterprise-grade security frameworks including identity management, encryption, compliance controls, and continuous monitoring. We also enable CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure automation, and containerized development using services like Azure Functions and Azure Kubernetes Service, ensuring secure, scalable, and efficient cloud operations.
